playbook.intent: One sitting to 3-8 client status emails sent, each anchored to scope + next milestone, scope-creep flagged.
playbook.scope: Founder writes status emails for all active retainers + projects in one sitting. Output: 3-8 status emails sent, each anchored to scope + next milestone, scope-creep flagged. Exit artifact: every active client received a status email by Friday EOD with a structured update.

success-criteria.criterion: Every active client emailed by Friday EOD
Each email anchored to scope + next milestone
Founder spent 90 min or less in single batch session

stage.name: Prep facts
stage.intent: Pull per-client deltas before writing anything.

tasks.task: Pull last week's delivered items per account
List next milestone + owner per account

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every client has a fact card.

stage.name: Draft in batch
stage.intent: One sitting, structured template, no Slack.

tasks.task: Anchor every paragraph to scope + milestone

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every client has a draft.

stage.name: Send + log
stage.intent: Send Friday; log scope-creep follow-ups for Monday review.

tasks.task: Send all emails in one session
Log scope-creep risks for Monday review

stage.decision-gate: Required: 100% of active clients emailed by Friday EOD.

extra.value: [Long-form quarterly business reviews - separate ritual, Marketing newsletters to clients - distinct cadence]
[Active retainer + project list with sponsor emails, Per-client scope + next-milestone notes]

[Writing scope-creep euphemisms instead of flagging it - invites silent drift, Skipping a client because 'nothing happened' - silence reads as trouble, Letting the batch slip past Friday - clients judge timeliness]
['Did every email map to a scope item and a milestone?', 'Did I flag scope-creep in writing, or only in my head?', 'Did I actually batch, or did I context-switch?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-client-status-email-batch --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-client-status-email-batch --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-client-status-email-batch --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
